description: Inquiry System and Appointment Scheduling modules - complete CRUD operations, student and staff views, real-time status tracking, and appointment booking with staff availability.
steps: Create src/server/trpc/routers/inquiry.ts - inquiry router: create mutation (studentId, category enum [VISA/ACADEMIC/FINANCIAL/HOUSING/GENERAL], subject, description, Zod validation), getAll query (filtered by role - students see own, staff see all, pagination, status filter, search), getById query, respond mutation (staff only - creates InquiryResponse, updates inquiry status), updateStatus mutation (staff only), delete mutation (soft delete or hard delete by staff)

Create src/app/(dashboard)/inquiries/page.tsx - Student inquiry list view: filter tabs (All/Pending/Responded/Closed), search input, create new inquiry button, inquiry cards with status badges (color-coded), category tags, date, click to expand/view detail

Create src/app/(dashboard)/inquiries/new/page.tsx - Create inquiry form: category dropdown, subject input, rich description textarea with character count, file attachment placeholder (for future S3 integration), submit with loading state, success toast and redirect

Create src/app/(dashboard)/inquiries/[id]/page.tsx - Inquiry detail view: full inquiry info at top, conversation thread below showing student message and staff responses in chat-like timeline, staff can type and submit response at bottom (only if role is STAFF), status badge with history

Create src/app/(dashboard)/staff/inquiries/page.tsx - Staff inquiry management: table/list view with all student inquiries, sortable columns (date, status, category, student), bulk actions (mark responded), quick-respond inline, click to open detail view

Create src/server/trpc/routers/appointment.ts - appointment router: create mutation (studentId, staffId, type ONLINE/FACE_TO_FACE, date, timeSlot, purpose, Zod validation, conflict check), getAll query (role-filtered, date range filter, status filter), getById query, updateStatus mutation (staff - confirm/cancel/complete), getAvailableSlots query (staffId + date -> returns available time slots), cancel mutation (student can cancel own pending appointments)

Create src/server/trpc/routers/availability.ts - availability router: setAvailability mutation (staff sets available dates/time slots as JSON array), getMyAvailability query (staff views own schedule), getStaffAvailability query (students can see a staff member's open slots for booking)

Create src/app/(dashboard)/appointments/page.tsx - Student appointment view: upcoming appointments list with date/time/type/status, past appointments section, 'Book New' button, calendar mini-view showing booked dates highlighted

Create src/app/(dashboard)/appointments/book/page.tsx - Booking flow: Step 1 select consultation type (Online/F2F), Step 2 select staff member from available list, Step 3 pick date from calendar showing available dates, Step 4 pick time slot from available slots for that date, Step 5 enter purpose/notes, confirmation summary, submit with loading state

Create src/app/(dashboard)/staff/appointments/page.tsx - Staff appointment management: calendar/agenda view of all appointments, today's appointments highlighted, confirm/cancel actions on pending appointments, view student info on each appointment

Create src/app/(dashboard)/staff/availability/page.tsx - Staff availability management: calendar interface to set available days, time slot grid (9AM-5PM in 30min increments) to toggle available slots per day, bulk set for recurring availability, save changes
Wire up inquiry and appointment routers in main appRouter
Verify: npm run build passes with all new pages
acceptance_criteria: Students can create inquiries with category, subject, and description
Students see their own inquiries filtered by status with proper badges
Staff can view all inquiries and respond with text responses
Inquiry detail shows conversation thread between student and staff
Appointment booking flow has multi-step wizard with date/time/staff selection
Available time slots are correctly filtered based on staff availability settings
Staff can manage their availability by date and time slots
Staff can confirm/cancel appointments with status updates
All tRPC routers have Zod input validation
findings: Zod v4 uses {message: ...} instead of {required_error: ...} for enum params. Build and lint pass cleanly. staffProcedure exists in trpc.ts and works for staff-only operations. Used trpc.useUtils() for invalidation after mutations.
